trades.reasoning: Top-ranked score 100 with RSI 66.6 in the optimal bullish momentum zone (not overbought), MACD bullish crossover, rising histogram, and volume surge — cleanest setup on the board.
Score 95, RSI 68.5 still in bullish zone, MACD crossover, price 12% above SMA-20 with volume surge — strong institutional interest in enterprise storage tech.
Score 95, RSI 67.2 in bullish zone, MACD crossover and volume surge confirm momentum, though the sub-$6 price warrants smaller position sizing.

decisions.briefing: Markets are flat today with both NASDAQ and S&P 500 up only 0.2%, signaling a consolidation day after recent strength. Most screener candidates are deeply overbought (RSI 75–90+), which creates mean-reversion risk, so I focused the three buys on the rare names still in the optimal RSI 55–70 momentum zone. Deploying most of the idle cash into TBBB, NTAP, and LPL fills three of four open slots with the highest-quality setups available.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities moved sideways on June 1st, with both the S&P 500 and NASDAQ gaining a modest 0.2%, reflecting a market in 'wait-and-see' mode as investors digest recent strong earnings season results and look ahead to upcoming economic data. Breadth was narrow, with technology and enterprise software leading slight gains while energy and consumer staples lagged. The lack of a clear catalyst kept institutional buyers on the sidelines, resulting in below-average volume across major indices.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市6月1日橫向整理，標普500指數與那斯達克指數均微升0.2%，反映投資人在消化近期強勁財報季後進入觀望狀態，靜待下一批經濟數據出爐。市場廣度偏窄，科技股及企業軟件板塊小幅領漲，能源與消費必需品則相對落後。由於缺乏明確催化劑，機構買盤趨於保守，主要指數成交量低於均值。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: When a stock's Relative Strength Index (RSI) climbs above 70, it signals the stock has risen very quickly in a short time and may be 'overbought' — meaning buyers may be exhausted and a pullback becomes more likely. Today's screener was dominated by stocks with RSI readings of 75–90+, which is why the portfolio avoided them and targeted the few names still in the healthier 55–70 momentum zone where upside tends to be more sustainable.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 當一支股票的相對強弱指數（RSI）升破70，代表股價在短時間內漲幅過急，可能出現「超買」狀態——即買方動能趨於枯竭，回調風險隨之上升。今日選股清單中，大多數個股的RSI介於75至90之間，因此本次操作刻意迴避這些超買股，轉而聚焦於RSI仍處於55至70健康動能區間的少數標的，此區間的上升趨勢通常更具持續性。
